------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  SDL.Versions

  Library version information.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

simple_types.name: Version_Level

record_types.name: Version

constants.name: Compiled
constants.code: Compiled : constant Version := (Major => Compiled_Major, Minor => Compiled_Minor, Patch => Compiled_Patch);

constants.name: Compiled_Major
constants.code:
Compiled_Major : constant Version_Level with
  Import        => True,
  Convention    => C,
  External_Name => "SDL_Ada_Major_Version";

constants.name: Compiled_Minor
constants.code:
Compiled_Minor : constant Version_Level with
  Import        => True,
  Convention    => C,
  External_Name => "SDL_Ada_Minor_Version";

constants.name: Compiled_Patch
constants.code:
Compiled_Patch : constant Version_Level with
  Import        => True,
  Convention    => C,
  External_Name => "SDL_Ada_Patch_Version";
